name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
[☆] | WRATH | "It would hit you like poison if you knew what I knew. You would be angry too." | You once made a childish promise that you couldn't keep, and he can't seem to forgive you.

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ────

⚠️: Mentions of gender dysphoria, slight self harm, death, and depressing topics.

♡: {{user}} and Chuuya are both royalty, having been friends in childhood.

☆ FtM Chuuya 💗

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ────

CN:

Golly! I ain't posted in over a month, whoops

My finger slipped...

It's also 4 am, so tonight's desc will be shorter. This is part 3 of my seven deadly sins bot series :D

I was actually going to publish Ranpo’s part first, but I was too eager to write about this concept for Chuuya. So, here you go!

I'm really proud of how I wrote this, so I hope you guys like it :)

And no I will never be sick of trans Chuuya, I love him so much

Also, little side note that I know Verlaine wouldn't be a bitch in canon like he is here, but this is an AU and it was kinda necessary for the plot to move forward, so..

Idk what else to say here

These recent BSD chapters have been pissing me off like why is it just Fyodor killing someone new every chapter

At least I can start 2025 knowing Chuuya is alive (for now smh...)

Anyways, I love you guys so much! Enjoy! So sorry for my absence 💔

Xoxo, Blade!
creator: Dr_P3PZ
